ValidationRule.description:
00e1q000000RAye = Finance Team profile edits 8.2.2024//Iida
Celigo Admin
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
((( (ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c , "UK") || ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, "US"))
&&
$Profile.Id <> "00e0Y000001NxlW" && $Profile.Id <> "00eP5000002KBpO" && $Profile.Id <> "00e1n000000jrhN" && NOT(ISBLANK(celigo_sfnsio__NetSuite_Id__c))
)
||
( NOT(ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c , "UK")) && NOT(ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, "US")) &&
$Profile.Id <> "00e0Y000001NxlW" && $Profile.Id <> "00eP5000002KBpO" && $Profile.Id <> "00e1n000000jrhN" && $Profile.Id <> "00e1n000000ZaNu" && NOT(ISBLANK(celigo_sfnsio__NetSuite_Id__c))
))
&& ( ( ISCHANGED(Name) && ISBLANK(Name) || ISCHANGED(Account_Currency__c) && ISBLANK(Account_Currency__c) || ISCHANGED(Vat_Tax_ID__c) && ISBLANK(Vat_Tax_ID__c) || ISCHANGED(Company_ID__c) && ISBLANK(Company_ID__c) || ISCHANGED(E_invoice_Address__c) && ISBLANK(E_invoice_Address__c) || ISCHANGED(Main_Invoice_Contact__c) && ISBLANK(Main_Invoice_Contact__c) || ISCHANGED(Invoice_Delivery_Method__c) && ISBLANK(TEXT(Invoice_Delivery_Method__c)) ) || ( NOT(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(Name))) && ISCHANGED(Name) || NOT(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(Account_Currency__c))) && ISCHANGED(Account_Currency__c) || NOT(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(Vat_Tax_ID__c))) && ISCHANGED(Vat_Tax_ID__c) || NOT(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(Company_ID__c))) && ISCHANGED(Company_ID__c) || NOT(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(E_invoice_Address__c))) && ISCHANGED(E_invoice_Address__c) || NOT(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(Main_Invoice_Contact__c))) && ISCHANGED(Main_Invoice_Contact__c) || NOT(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(Invoice_Delivery_Method__c))) && ISCHANGED(Invoice_Delivery_Method__c) ) ) && $Setup.rh2__PS_Settings__c.rh2__Run_Validation_Rule__c) && $Setup.rh2__PS_Settings__c.rh2__Run_Validation_Rule__c
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot change this field value for an Account that is already on Netsuite. Please Chatter your Finance team who can carry out this action.
